name: backend
description: Shared library for the domain-oriented monorepo: contracts, events, middleware, logging, error handling, validation utilities, shared types, common configuration and OpenAPI documentation.

scripts.db:reset:auth: npm --prefix app/services/auth-service run db:drop && npm --prefix app/services/auth-service run db:migrate
scripts.db:reset:task: npm --prefix app/services/task-service run db:drop && npm --prefix app/services/task-service run db:migrate
scripts.db:reset:category: npm --prefix app/services/category-service run db:drop && npm --prefix app/services/category-service run db:migrate
scripts.db:reset:collab: npm --prefix app/services/collaboration-service run db:drop && npm --prefix app/services/collaboration-service run db:migrate
scripts.db:reset:media: npm --prefix app/services/media-service run db:drop && npm --prefix app/services/media-service run db:migrate
scripts.db:reset:notify: npm --prefix app/services/notification-service run db:drop && npm --prefix app/services/notification-service run db:migrate
scripts.db:generate:all: npm-run-all --parallel db:generate:auth db:generate:task db:generate:category db:generate:collab db:generate:media db:generate:notify db:generate:report
scripts.db:migrate:all: npm-run-all --serial db:migrate:auth db:migrate:task db:migrate:category db:migrate:collab db:migrate:media db:migrate:notify db:migrate:report
scripts.setup:local: npm run db:generate:all && npm run db:migrate:all && npm run db:seed:all
scripts.start:all: concurrently "npm run dev:auth" "npm run dev:task" "npm run dev:category" "npm run dev:collab" "npm run dev:media" "npm run dev:notify" "npm run dev:report"
scripts.db:reset:all: npm-run-all --serial db:reset:auth db:reset:task db:reset:category db:reset:collab db:reset:media db:reset:notify db:reset:report db:seed:all
scripts.db:reset:report: npm --prefix app/services/reporting-service run db:drop && npm --prefix app/services/report-service run db:migrate
